summary: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer speaks at a podium with the vice-presidential seal before a crowd in MAGA hats at an 'American Jobs' White House event, praising Trump as a 'master negotiator' striking trade deals. It is a lightly-edited speech excerpt with a lower-third text-to-subscribe banner, not a music-driven cinematic montage.
notable_text: 'TEXT "VP" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE'; 'THE WHITE HOUSE'; 'AMERICAN JOBS'
